children.text: Unpacking Database. Please enjoy the view.
This guide has everything you need to plan your trip, navigate the park, collect a list of your favorite places, and share your adventures!
Install a detailed guide and download a map of the park before you visit!
How would you like your map pins?
Pick your interests, and our trip planning tool will give you instant recommendations for your park visit.
Use "My Chimani" to track places you visit and events you attend - and browse the bookmarks you create by clicking the orange plus sign when you visit a favorite location!
